command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 45EyxYVJKxfKNgq.995c0e9f06f5 --database TN563UpDJCcuGULZGrQyaX --execute 
-- Erstelle Admin-User für c.herr@angelus.group
INSERT INTO users (email, role, name, createdAt, updatedAt) 
VALUES ('c.herr@angelus.group', 'admin', 'C. Herr', NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE role = 'admin';

-- Erstelle Admin-User für f.schmid@angelus.group
INSERT INTO users (email, role, name, createdAt, updatedAt) 
VALUES ('f.schmid@angelus.group', 'admin', 'F. Schmid', NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE role = 'admin';

-- Überprüfe die erstellten Admin-User
SELECT id, email, role, name, createdAt FROM users WHERE email IN ('c.herr@angelus.group', 'f.schmid@angelus.group', 'grossdigitalpartner@gmail.com') ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
